items.title_en: Inflation likely to stay ‘significantly above target,’ top European central banker warns

items.title_en: Digital Realty falls 4% after taking $3.5 billion stake in Blackstone's Virginia data centers

items.desc_en: Digital Realty fell in premarket trading Tuesday after it announced its buying a $3.5 billion stake in three data centers from asset manager Blackstone.
items.desc_zh: Digital Realty 宣布从资产管理公司 Blackstone 手中购买价值 35 亿美元的三个数据中心股份，周二盘前交易中股价下跌。

items.desc_zh: 法国生物技术公司 Abivax 发布其治疗肠道疾病的主要药物的最新数据后，其股价周二飙升。

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack

items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。
